title: androsace carnea var. puberula
intro: Androsace carnea var. puberula, also known as the hairy rock jasmine or dwarf carnea, is a flowering plant species native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems. Androsace carnea var. puberula can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are consumed orally to utilize its medicinal properties.
